title: Regional travel warmth and recap phase
summary: Forty-eighth structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-1 wave strengthens inland regional travel warmth through current map and post seams, then adds one tiny return-recap pass inside the existing station and map flow.

execution_order.goal: Prepare an inland regional-travel warmth handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Travel should feel less generic now that season two is live.
Map movement and posts are the right small seams for stronger regional feel.
The new warmth should stay tiny and readable.
The outing return loop can still feel a bit more intentionally closed.
A tiny recap can add closure without another planner layer.
The recap should feel calm, not dashboard-like.

guardrails: Do not add a new station page.
Do not add a larger travel HUD.
Reuse the current map footer, posts, routes strip, and expedition seams.
Keep the recap tiny and optional.
acceptance_focus: Returning from an outing feels a little more closed and intentional.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-1.md, docs/reports/2026-04-02-regional-travel-warmth-and-recap-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as lane 1's next wave: strengthen inland regional travel warmth through existing map and post seams, then add one tiny return-recap pass without opening a larger planner shell.
